payload.label: picture frame
payload.short_description: white picture frame with black inset
payload.long_description: White rectangular plastic picture-frame-like unit with a dark rectangular central inset resembling a screen or photo area, two small round button markings along the lower front, slightly blurred/low-resolution appearance; the object fills most of the crop and appears wall-mounted and about 0.5 m from the camera.
